name: Crockpot Smothered Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken breasts into stew-sized chunks.
2. Sauté the chicken while washing and cutting mushrooms in half.
3. Add all ingredients to the chicken and simmer for about 1 hour.
4. Alternatively, place everything in a crockpot and let it simmer all day.
5. Serve over rice, noodles, or potatoes.
